tournaments.title: CS2 Global Championship
tournaments.description: Compete with the best Counter-Strike 2 teams from around the world in this premier championship event. Featuring a double-elimination bracket, professional casting, and a massive prize pool. Teams will battle across iconic maps to claim the title of global champion.

tournaments.title: Dota 2 Masters League
tournaments.description: Join the ultimate Dota 2 competitive experience featuring top-tier teams battling through a Swiss-format group stage followed by a single-elimination playoff. Expect intense drafts, legendary plays, and unforgettable moments across three weeks of non-stop action.

tournaments.title: Fortnite Battle Royale Cup
tournaments.description: Drop in and fight for victory in the most exciting Fortnite Battle Royale tournament of the year. Solo and duo formats available with rotating zones, custom rulesets, and live leaderboard tracking. Show off your building skills and game sense to climb the ranks.

tournaments.title: Valorant Pro Invitational
tournaments.description: An invite-only Valorant tournament where precision aim meets tactical brilliance. Top teams compete in a best-of-three format across all competitive maps. Featuring live commentary, player cams, and exclusive in-game rewards for participants.

tournaments.title: League of Legends Clash
tournaments.description: Gather your team and enter the League of Legends Clash — a weekend-long tournament series with tiered brackets based on skill level. Earn exclusive rewards, climb the rankings, and prove your team's coordination in the most popular MOBA on the planet.

tournaments.title: Apex Legends Showdown
tournaments.description: Squad up for the Apex Legends Showdown — a high-octane tournament featuring trios competing across multiple rounds of intense battle royale action. Master your legend abilities, coordinate with your team, and outgun the competition in Kings Canyon and World's Edge.

tournaments.title: Warzone Elite Cup
tournaments.description: The Warzone Elite Cup brings together the fiercest Call of Duty competitors in a multi-day battle royale event. Custom lobbies, kill-race formats, and placement-based scoring ensure only the most skilled and strategic players rise to the top.

tournaments.title: PUBG Survival Tournament
tournaments.description: Test your survival instincts in the PUBG Survival Tournament. Drop onto Erangel and Miramar in squad-based matches with a point system rewarding both placement and eliminations. Ten days of grueling competition to crown the ultimate survivor.
